questions.question: Oasis is to Sand as Island is to?
Safe is to Secure as Protect is to?
Melt is to Liquid as Freeze is to?
Architect is to Building as Sculptor is to?
Pen is to Poet as Needle is to?
Eye is to Myopia as Teeth is to?
Tractor is to Trailer as Horse is to?
Reading is to Knowledge as Work is to?
Conference is to Chairman as Newspaper is to?
Pigeon is to Peace as White Flag is to?
Pointing to a photograph of a boy Suresh said, 'He is the son of the only son of my mother.' How is Suresh related to that boy?
If A is the brother of B; B is the sister of C; and C is the father of D, how D is related to A?
Pointing to a photograph, a woman says, 'This man's son's sister is my mother-in-law.' How is the woman's husband related to the man in the photograph?
A is the mother of B and C. If D is the husband of C, what is A to D?
Pointing to a man, a woman said, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
X and Y are brothers. R is the father of Y. S is the brother of T and maternal uncle of X. What is T to R?
A girl introduced a boy as the son of the daughter of the father of her uncle. The boy is girl's:
Pointing to a gentleman, Deepak said, 'His only brother is the father of my daughter's father.' How is the gentleman related to Deepak?
If 'P + Q' means P is the brother of Q; 'P x Q' means P is the father of Q; 'P - Q' means P is the sister of Q, which of the following represents 'S is the niece of T'?
A man walks 5 km toward south and then turns to the right. After walking 3 km he turns to the left and walks 5 km. Now in which direction is he from the starting place?
Rahul put his timepiece on the table in such a way that at 6 P.M. hour hand points to North. In which direction the minute hand will point at 9.15 P.M.?
A boy rode his bicycle Northward, then turned left and rode 1 km and again turned left and rode 2 km. He found himself 1 km west of his starting point. How far did he ride northward initially?
K is 40 m South-West of L. If M is 40 m South-East of L, then M is in which direction of K?
A man walks 2 km towards North. Then he turns to East and walks 10 km. After this he turns to North and walks 3 km. Again he turns towards East and walks 2 km. How far is he from the starting point?

One morning after sunrise, Vimal started to walk. During this walking he met Stephen who was coming from opposite direction. Vimal watch that the shadow of Stephen to the right of him (Vimal). To Which direction Vimal was facing?
Choose the word which is least like the other words in the group.
Find the odd one out.
Which of the following does not belong to the group?
Identify the odd word out.
Choose the word which is different from the rest.
Find the odd one out.
Which of the following does not belong?
If the alphabet is written in reverse order, which will be the 8th letter to the right of the 14th letter from the left?

How many such pairs of letters are there in the word 'CORPORATE' each of which has as many letters between them in the word as in the English alphabet?
Arrange the given words in alphabetical order and choose the one that comes first.
If in a certain language, MADRAS is coded as NBESBT, how is BOMBAY coded in that code?
In a certain code, TRIPPLE is written as SQHOOKD. How is DISPOSE written in that code?
If FRIEND is coded as HUMJTK, how is CANDLE written in that code?
Statement: All dogs are cats. Some cats are rats. Conclusion 1: Some dogs are rats. Conclusion 2: Some rats are cats.
Statement: All pens are pencils. No pencil is an eraser. Conclusion 1: No pen is an eraser. Conclusion 2: Some pencils are pens.
Statement: Some books are magazines. Some magazines are novels. Conclusion 1: Some books are novels. Conclusion 2: No book is a novel.
Statement: All birds are trees. All trees are papers. Conclusion 1: All birds are papers. Conclusion 2: Some papers are birds.
Statement: No man is a monkey. John is a man. Conclusion 1: John is not a monkey. Conclusion 2: John may or may not be a monkey.
Find the next number in the series: 2, 5, 10, 17, 26, ...
Find the missing number: 8, 27, 64, 125, ?
If Z = 52 and ACT = 48, then BAT will be equal to

Good is to Bad as Roof is to?
Clock is to Time as Thermometer is to?
Illness is to Cure as Grief is to?
Menu is to Food as Catalogue is to?
Pulp is to Paper as Hemp is to?
A is B's sister. C is B's mother. D is C's father. E is D's mother. Then, how is A related to D?
Pointing to a person, a man said to a woman, 'His mother is the only daughter of your father.' How was the woman related to the person?
Pointing to a photograph, a lady tells Ram, 'I am the only daughter of this lady and her son is your maternal uncle.' How is the speaker related to Ram's father?
A man said to a lady, 'Your mother's husband's sister is my aunt.' How is the lady related to the man?
If 'A $ B' means A is the father of B; 'A # B' means A is the sister of B; 'A * B' means A is the daughter of B, then how is P related to Q in P # R $ Q?

A rat run 20 towards East and turns to right runs 10 and turns to right runs 9 and again turns to left runs 5 and then turns to left runs 12 and finally turns to left and runs 6. Now which direction is the rat facing?
You go North, turn right, then right again and then go to the left. In which direction are you now?
I am facing East. I turn 100 degrees in the clockwise direction and then 145 degrees in the anticlockwise direction. Which direction am I facing now?
A river flows west to east and on the way turns left and goes in a semi-circle round a hillock, and then turns left at right angles. In which direction is the river finally flowing?
Ravi is walking in the East direction. After covering a distance of 1 km, he turns 45 degrees left and then 90 degrees right. In which direction is he now?

Which word cannot be formed using the letters of the word 'RECREATION'?
If E = 5 and HOTEL = 60, how will you code LAMB?
Statement: Some actors are singers. All the singers are dancers. Conclusion 1: Some actors are dancers. Conclusion 2: No singer is actor.
Statement: All harmoniums are instruments. All instruments are flutes. Conclusion 1: All flutes are instruments. Conclusion 2: All harmoniums are flutes.
Statement: Some ants are parrots. All the parrots are apples. Conclusion 1: All the apples are parrots. Conclusion 2: Some ants are apples.
Statement: Some papers are pens. All the pencils are pens. Conclusion 1: Some pens are pencils. Conclusion 2: Some pens are papers.
Statement: No door is dog. All the dogs are cats. Conclusion 1: No door is cat. Conclusion 2: No cat is door. Conclusion 3: Some cats are dogs.

Find the missing term: 1, 9, 25, 49, ?, 121
Which word is the odd man out?

Heart is to Cardiologist as Kidney is to?

Q's mother is sister of P and daughter of M. S is daughter of P and sister of T. How is M related to T?
If P is the husband of Q and R is the mother of S and Q, what is R to P?
A watch reads 4.30. If the minute hand points East, in what direction will the hour hand point?

A man leaves for his office from his house. He walks towards East. After moving a distance of 20 m, he turns South and walks 10 m. Then he walks 35 m towards the West and further 5 m towards the North. He then turns towards East and walks 15 m. What is the straight distance in meters between his initial and final positions?

Find the odd one out.

Statement: All water is liquid. All liquid is solid. Conclusion 1: All water is solid. Conclusion 2: Some solid is water.

If South-East becomes North, North-East becomes West and so on. What will West become?

From his house, Lokesh went 15 km to the North. Then he turned west and covered 10 km. Then he turned south and covered 5 km. Finally turning to the east, he covered 10 km. In which direction is he from his house?

A child is looking for his father. He went 90 meters in the east before turning to his right. He went 20 meters before turning to his right again to look for his father at his uncle's place 30 meters from this point. His father was not there. From there, he went 100 meters to his north before meeting his father in a street. How far did the son meet his father from the starting point?
